descriptionLead: Join our authorized distributor network to access preferential pricing, priority logistics, and full marketing support.
descriptionHighlight: Grow with us — territory protection, training, and incentives available.

valueProp.description: We provide the system, the product, and the market positioning. You provide the local dominance.

benefits.label: Why Partner With Us
benefits.title: Distributor Privileges
benefits.description: Strategic advantages designed for your business sustainability.

items.title: Market Demand
items.desc: Research-driven products with strong demand and fast-moving parts.

items.title: Healthy Margin
items.desc: Tiered pricing structure that protects distributor profitability.

items.title: Digital Support
items.desc: Official distributor listing on our main website.

items.title: Legal & Protection
items.desc: Brand legal support and territorial protection.

support.title: Promotion & Support System
support.description: We do not let you fight alone. Our support system is designed to accelerate your market penetration.

items.title: Free Buffer Stock
items.desc: Special suspension buffer stock program for the beginning of the year.

items.title: Smart Bundling
items.desc: Sales packages that combine moving parts and slow-moving parts.

items.title: Marketing Kit
items.desc: Catalogs, banners, apparel, and digital assets.

items.title: Priority Shipping
items.desc: Priority logistics lane for distributor restocking.

territory.label: Blue Ocean Strategy
territory.description: We guarantee territorial exclusivity. No internal brand price wars. Your area is your asset.

qualification.title: Qualification
qualification.description: We are highly selective in choosing partners. This program is only for serious business entities.
items: Minimum 3 years of automotive industry experience
Own sales team and logistics fleet
Commitment to pricing and territorial SOP

closing.title: LIMITED OPPORTUNITY.
closing.description: Early Partner Advantage securing long-term ecosystem position.
